name: Originator

consumes.minimum: 1 active comp + 1 selected ShapeLayer containing at least 1 shape path with vertices
consumes.description: Reads app.project.activeItem (CompItem), activeItem.selectedLayers[0] (ShapeLayer), then recursively traverses the layer's Contents property to extract all ADBE Vector Group and ADBE Vector Shape - Group properties and their Path sub-properties (including keyframed Shape values).

controls.name: Shape Path Tree
controls.role: displays hierarchical shape path tree; user selects one or more paths or groups to center

controls.name: Center Selected
controls.role: confirms selection and triggers centering of all selected shape paths

controls.name: Cancel
controls.role: closes the dialog without centering any paths

functions: recursively traverses Shape Layer Contents to extract vector groups and shape paths
computes bounding-box centroid of each shape path from its vertex array
offsets all vertices (and preserves in/out tangents) to recenter the path to (0,0)
processes all keyframes when a path property is animated, using the first keyframe's centroid as the shared offset
auto-centers immediately when exactly one shape path is found (headless, no dialog)
displays a multi-select tree-view dialog for layers with two or more shape paths
wraps all mutations in a single undo group named 'Center Shape Path Origin'

scriptSim.inputs: Active comp 'Origin Comp' (1920×1080, 24fps); selected ShapeLayer 'Star Shape' containing Contents > Group 1 > Path 1 > Path with a square at vertices [[100,100],[200,100],[200,200],[100,200]], closed, no keyframes.

operations.target: The shape path has been centered.

notes: The DIALOG is only shown when the selected layer contains 2 or more shape paths; single-path layers are processed headlessly.
Centroid is computed as the midpoint of the bounding box (min/max of vertices), not the geometric centroid of the polygon area.
For animated paths, all keyframes are shifted by the same offset derived from the first keyframe's bounding-box center, so relative animation is preserved.
The tree-view dialog supports multiselect; selecting a group node recursively centers all child shape paths.
Tangent handles (inTangents, outTangents) are copied unchanged — only vertex positions are shifted.
Requires Adobe After Effects CS6 or later for Shape Layer (ShapeLayer instanceof) support.

The script uses getPathFromChain() which navigates via property('Contents').property(name) at each chain level — this approach fails if a group or path name contains special characters that AE property lookup cannot resolve by name.
